results.description: FABRICATION AND DELIVERY OF A TRASH HUNTER VESSEL, TRAILER, AND ACCOMPANYING PARTS FOR FISHTRAP LAKE, SHELBIANA, KENTUCKY. US ARMY CORPS OF ENGINEERS, HUNTINGTON DISTRICT
